author: lOrm
content: Resolved via ToolArgs trait extension at src/tools/args.rs (367 LOC + 18 tests). Replaced 30+ duplicated args.get(k).and_then(as_str) call sites across 14 files. Error wording normalised to 'Missing KEY argument' format. cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings: exit 0. cargo test --lib: 1420 passed (baseline 1402, +18 from new accessor tests). 4 worktree-test failures are environmental (parallel-agent cwd race), not regressions. NO #[allow], NO clippy.toml, NO #[ignore]. Refactor sits on branch fix-675-final / worktree .worktrees/fix-675-x (uncommitted per task instruction).
